---
title: "Shiny_APP"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-08"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library("tidyverse")
library("janitor")
library(RColorBrewer)
library(paletteer)
library(ggthemes)
library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)
```

```{r}
birds <- read.csv("data/bird_collision.csv") %>% 
  clean_names()
```

```{r}
birds <- birds %>% 
  separate(col="date", into = c("month","day","year"), sep = "/") %>% ##separate month into col
  select(!day) %>% ##remove day, since data already has a day col
  mutate(month=as.factor(month)) ##make month into a factor
```


```{r}
birds <- birds %>% ##make a new column showing what season, since the data is split by spring or fall
  mutate(season=case_when(
    month=="4" | month=="5" | month=="6" ~ "spring",
    month=="8" | month=="9" | month=="10" | month=="11" ~ "fall",
    .default=NA
  ))
```

```{r}
names(birds)
```


```{r}
my_palette <- paletteer_d("ggsci::indigo_material")
my_palette
```

```{r, eval=F, echo=T}
ui <- dashboardPage(
  
  dashboardHeader(title="Collision Predictor"),
  
  dashboardSidebar(disable=T),
  
  dashboardBody(
    fluidRow(
      box(
  selectInput("x",
                  "Compare Collisions By:",
                  choices = c("Month" = "month",
                              "Season" = "season",
                              "Building" = "building",
                              "Visibility" = "visibility"),
                  selected = "Month"),
      ),
      box(
        plotOutput("plot", width="500px", height="400px")
  
   )
    )
)

)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  output$plot <- renderPlot({
    birds %>% 
      group_by(.data[[input$x]]) %>%
      summarize(total_count = sum(count)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x= .data[[input$x]], y = total_count)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill=my_palette[8], alpha = 0.8) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = my_palette) +
      theme_tufte() +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18),
            axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
            axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45,hjust=1),
            legend.position = "none")+
      labs(x=tools::toTitleCase(input$x), y="Number of Collisions", title=paste("Collisions by", x=tools::toTitleCase(input$x)))
  })
  
  
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```


```{r, eval=F, echo=T}
ui <- dashboardPage(
  dashboardHeader(title = "Collision Range Predictor",
                  titleWidth = 300),
  dashboardSidebar(disable = T),
  dashboardBody(
    fluidRow(
      box(
        width = 4,
        selectInput("month", "Month", choices = unique(birds$month)),
        selectInput("season", "Season", choices = unique(birds$season)),
        selectInput("building", "Building Type", choices = unique(birds$building)),
        selectInput("visibility", "Visibility", choices = unique(birds$visibility)),
        selectInput("x", "X Variable",
          choices = c("Season" = "season", "Month" = "month",
                      "Building" = "building", "Visibility" = "visibility")),
        selectInput("y", "Y Variable",
          choices = c("Collision Count" = "count", "Temperature" = "temperature",
                      "Visibility Distance" = "visibility_distance",
                      "Ceiling Height" = "ceiling_height"))
      ),
      box(
        width = 10,
        plotOutput("boxplot", width = "100%", height = "500px")
        )
      )
    )
  )

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  filtered <- reactive({
    birds %>%
      filter(
        month == input$month,
        season == input$season,
        building == input$building,
        visibility == input$visibility
      )
  })
  
  output$boxplot <- renderPlot({
    filtered() %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = .data[[input$x]], y = .data[[input$y]])) +
      geom_boxplot(fill = "#5C6BC0FF", alpha = 0.8) +
      theme_tufte() +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)
      ) +
      labs(x=tools::toTitleCase(input$x),y=tools::toTitleCase(input$y),title = "Collision Data Range")
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```


##colors (for theme, use theme_tufte())
```{r}
colors <- paletteer::palettes_d_names
```
